provenance.handoff_reason: initial model reached its monthly spend limit

TECHNICAL_EVIDENCE_STATE.strongest_supporting_evidence: Executable counterexample (TRIB-F-001), reproduced independently by both model phases: pool=100, lottery_share_bps=-1000, well-formed sole donor -> issuance 110, unissued_remainder=-10, falsifying the REDTEAM package's own documented supply invariant.
TECHNICAL_EVIDENCE_STATE.strongest_counterevidence: All committed suites reproduce (37/72/25/19/185 tests, 43/0/0 differential); normative design allocation and Breaker lottery surface unaffected and fail closed.
falsifiers: counterexample fails to reproduce on the exact frozen commit (it did not)
the invariant claim is shown to have always been scoped to valid inputs only (it is not)
TECHNICAL_EVIDENCE_STATE.precise_next_action: Execute REPAIR_ACCEPTANCE_PLAN R1, then obtain a fresh independent retest of the exact repaired commit.

MECHANISM_RESEARCH_DIRECTION.strongest_supporting_evidence: No executable counterexample to the arithmetic core survives after seven adversarial packages; every alleged unconditional economic failure reduces to conditional/policy; three separate mechanism-facing audit sessions independently arrived at CONTINUE_WITH_CONDITIONS from fresh sessions.
MECHANISM_RESEARCH_DIRECTION.strongest_counterevidence: The core causal premise (transferable reward induces additional giving) is unmodelled and unmeasured everywhere; every proven risk scales with success; the record's only fully autonomous full-seat pre-tribunal verdict was REJECT_OR_REDESIGN.
unresolved_assumptions: that the attached conditions (S1-S6) are cheap and decisive relative to their information value
falsifiers: S1 product-function matrix shows no design serves required functions within proven constraints
S6-grade empirical evidence shows near-zero or adverse induced giving
MECHANISM_RESEARCH_DIRECTION.precise_next_action: S1: product/ledger function specification with executable acceptance table.

TRANSFERABILITY_DEFAULT.strongest_supporting_evidence: Every currently specified ledger function (receipt binding, charitable transfer binding, finite allocation, permissionless claim) is implementable without alienable units; two structurally independent mechanism models reach this by construction; non-transferable regime removes the float powering every proven attack pathway.
TRANSFERABILITY_DEFAULT.strongest_counterevidence: Unspecified future functions (payment, fees, staking, security bonding, store of value) are untested and might require transferability.
unresolved_assumptions: only currently-specified functions are held as requirements
TRANSFERABILITY_DEFAULT.confidence: HIGH within specified functions; LOW for unspecified future ledger
falsifiers: an executable required-function acceptance test that only a transferable design passes
TRANSFERABILITY_DEFAULT.precise_next_action: Adopt as working default now; reverse only via S1's acceptance table with an attached falsifier.

EVIDENCE_FOR_FINAL_MECHANISM_CHOICE.strongest_supporting_evidence: Participation elasticity, displacement, rebate-access distribution, token value, and liquidity remain unmeasured everywhere in the record; PR44 and PR45's EVIDENCE_STATE verdicts are compatible once read as answering different questions (bounded decision vs final choice), and both concede these empirical variables are open.
EVIDENCE_FOR_FINAL_MECHANISM_CHOICE.strongest_counterevidence: The arithmetic/structural/countermodel layers are unusually thorough and mutually reproduced across 3+ independent implementations; under a narrower reading of 'final choice' as 'which modeled regime to research next', evidence may already be sufficient.
unresolved_assumptions: what 'final mechanism choice' is taken to mean; this verdict adopts the stricter (launchable design decision) reading
EVIDENCE_FOR_FINAL_MECHANISM_CHOICE.confidence: HIGH that sign-controlling empirical variables are unresolved; MODERATE on which reading of 'final choice' governs
falsifiers: a preregistered empirical study (S6) closing participation elasticity and flow composition

REAL_WORLD_READINESS.strongest_supporting_evidence: All cryptography and Bitcoin interface synthetic by design; no real charity/donor/key/transaction anywhere; economic gate explicitly not passed; all five audited PRs and both tribunal phases independently arrive at RESEARCH_ONLY; STATUS.json unchanged at R016 throughout.
falsifiers: separately-governed operator promotion completing real Bitcoin, real PQ, charity ceremony, legal review, and economic-gate-pass tracks
REAL_WORLD_READINESS.precise_next_action: None from this tribunal; Tracks B-F per program roadmap at operator discretion, outside this tribunal's authority.

NEXT_PHASE.strongest_supporting_evidence: Exactly one confirmed blocker exists (TRIB-F-001/002), it is small and fully specified (R1), and completing it does not foreclose or prejudge S1 - it removes a false claim from the record before the specification round builds on it.
NEXT_PHASE.strongest_counterevidence: RETURN_TO_SPECIFICATION (S1 directly) is arguably more research-decisive since it is what discriminates between continuing and stopping the program; the repair is comparatively low-stakes.
unresolved_assumptions: sequencing the mechanical repair before the judgment-heavy specification work is worth the delay
falsifiers: R1 shown to be far more involved than scoped (not observed)
S1 judged urgent enough to run in parallel with R1 (defensible operator call)
NEXT_PHASE.precise_next_action: Execute R1, obtain fresh independent retest, then proceed to S1.

single_controlling_next_action: Execute REPAIR_ACCEPTANCE_PLAN R1 (bounded scheme-parameter validation and supply-invariant gate in the REDTEAM economics package), obtain a fresh independent retest of the exact repaired commit, then proceed to S1 (product/ledger function specification).
nonclaims: No status promotion, R-round assignment, or STATUS.json change.
No live funds, donations, charity selection, solicitation, token issuance, deployment, or production authorization.
Model-family labels are not treated as proof of independence, within or across model phases.
Passing tests, merge state, and repeated prose are not treated as proof of truth.
